[ DRUNK USER ]

~ He tries to call you while you’re at a club ~

I will admit this isn’t my best work, but it’s late and I really wanted to get this idea out! Despite the somewhat lazy writing I hope you enjoy this bot! As always, feel free to give me any criticisms you may have!

Edit: Fixed up the intro and TRIED to get it to my liking hope y’all like it!

P.s. I’ve been noticing the amount of traction this bot is getting, hope WOTFI didn’t mess y’all up too much lol
